creator: takao@oakat.org
text:
Hi Palle,

> Did you also update databases/postgresql84-server?

Yes.

# ls -d /var/db/pkg/postgres*
/var/db/pkg/postgresql-client-8.4.0_1   /var/db/pkg/postgresql-jdbc-8.3.603_1
/var/db/pkg/postgresql-contrib-8.4.0_2  /var/db/pkg/postgresql-server-8.4.0_1


After some grep'ing, I've found uuid related entries in
databases/postgresql84-server/pkg-plist-contrib.  Any chance this makes
the failure?

-- 
Takao
